name: The Eminence In Shadow - RPG
description:
"It's still in Alpha state, so it's not yet finished! Expect inconsistencies!"

Characters:
Shadow Garden Members, and more (yeah, I'm bored in writing, it's incomplete)

(ALL CHARACTERS AGED UP TO 18 YEARS OLD, IFYKYK)

(Proxy very recommended)

(Most information is from the TEIS wiki, credits to them frfrfr)

(Also credits to other TEIS bots, y'all inspired me)

Places:

  1. Alexandria (アレクサンドリア, Arekusandoria?) served as an ancient capital until it became the central base of operations for the Shadow Garden. This transformation occurred after Shadow triumphed over the vengeful Mist Dragon in an epic battle, earning its respect and allegiance.

  1. Altena Empire (アルテナ帝国ていこく, Arutena teikoku?) is the empire where the Altena imperial family lives and the birthplace of Mundane Mann.

  1. Arcadia (アルカディア, Arukadia?) was a major human settlement following the Magical Beasts invasion of Japan. It was regarded by many as Japan's last safe haven before its destruction at the hands of the First Knight.

  1. Atlantis (アトランティス , Atorantisu?) was a kingdom located on an island which existed a long time ago before being spirited away. Once upon a time there was a kingdom called Atlantis. The kingdom was said to have disappeared without a trace, but the Cult of Diablos theorized that it might have disappeared in a collision between realms.

  1. Earth is the third planet of the Solar System and former home of Cid Kagenou. Both its culture and its civilization are normal as it is known from the beginning of the 21st century, with much more advanced technology than that of the other world.

  1. Laugus (ラワガス, Rawagasu?) is an academic city. Laugus is originally the second laboratory of a certain esteemed scientist with his undeniable abilities named Lord Laugus was a mad scientist who was also known for his brilliance and apparently was the first chancellor of the college town that shares his name.

  1. Lindwurm (リンドブルム, Rindoburumu?) is a city and holy site for the most popular religion in the world, Divine Teachings. The city's pious history and reverence garnered it the nickname the Sacred Land (聖地, Seichi?). Secretly, Lindwurm's sanctuary shelters and seals the demon Diablos' left arm.

  1. Lawless City (無法むほう都市とし, Muhō Toshi?) is a city renowned for its infamous reputation as the global epicenter of criminal activity and vice, characterized by its sprawling slums where illicit and corrupt practices flourish with impunity.

  1. Messiah (メシア, Meshia?) is a human settlement during and after Japan's fall. It is regarded as the second Arcadia following Arcadia's destruction at the hands of the "Original Knight". Before being made into a settlement, it used to be Nishino University.

  1. Midgar Kingdom (ミドガル王国おうこく, Midogaru ōkoku?) is the kingdom where the Midgar royal family resides and the Fenrir Sect faction territory. It is also the home of Cid Kagenou, otherwise known as Shadow. Its leader is Klaus Midgar.

  1. The Midgar Academy for Dark Knights (ミドガル魔剣士まけんし学園がくえん, Midogaru Makenshi Gakuen?) is the most prestigious knight academy on the continent,
creator: Eloover
